Geddy Lucier
Pipeline Mapping Across US

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(maps)
library(sf)
library(ggspatial)
library(terra)
library(tidyterra)
library(ggplot2)
library(basemaps)
library(OpenStreetMap)
library(maptiles)
library(rmapshaper)
library(sfnetworks)
library(dplyr)
setwd("~/Documents/GitHub/ENVS_Seniorthesis/")
```


General US mapping
```{r}
pipes <- st_read("data/naturalgas_interintrastate_pipelines_us_eia.geojson")

basin <- st_read("data/MiddleDevonianMarcellusShaleAUs/")
basin <- st_transform(basin, 4326)


us <- st_as_sf(map("state", plot = FALSE, fill = TRUE))
us <- st_transform(us, 4326)

boston_sf <- st_as_sf(
  data.frame(
    city = "Boston",
    lon = -71.0589,
    lat = 42.3601
  ),
  coords = c("lon", "lat"),
  crs = 4326
) #manually build boston 

chicago_sf <- st_as_sf(
  data.frame(
    city = "Chicago",
    lon = -87.6298,
    lat = 41.8781
  ),
  coords = c("lon", "lat"),
  crs = 4326
) # same with chicago

ggplot() +
  # US map first
  geom_sf(
    data = us,
    fill = "gray85",
    color = "white"
  ) +
  # Pipeline layer on top
  geom_sf(
    data = pipes,
    color = "red",
    size = 0.2,
    alpha = 0.8
  ) +
  coord_sf() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "U.S. Natural Gas Pipeline Network",
    x = "",
    y = ""
  )
```

```{r}

```







```{r}
marcellus_ops <- c(
  "ANR Pipeline Co",
  "Vector Pipeline Co",
  "Rockies Express Pipeline",
  "Texas Eastern Trans Co",
  "Northern Border PL Co",
  "Natural Gas PL Co of Am",     # NGPL
  "Panhandle Eastern PL Co"      # receives REX + ANR blends
)

marcellus_opps_df <- pipes %>% filter(operator %in% marcellus_ops)

marcellus_bbox <- st_bbox(c(
  xmin = -83,
  xmax = -73.5,
  ymin = 37.5,
  ymax = 43
), crs = 4326) |>
  st_as_sfc()

marcellus_pipes <- st_filter(pipes, basin)

ma_marcellus_pipes <- st_filter(marcellus_pipes, ma_pipes)

ggplot() +
  # US map first
  geom_sf(
    data = us,
    fill = "gray85",
    color = "white"
  ) +
  # Pipeline layer on top
  geom_sf(
    data = marcellus_pipes,
    color = "red",
    size = 0.2,
    alpha = 0.8
  ) +
  coord_sf() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "U.S. Natural Gas Pipeline Network",
    x = "",
    y = ""
  )
```




```{r}
MA <- us %>%
  filter(ID == "massachusetts") # mass 

ma_pipes <- st_intersection(pipes, MA)

IL <- us %>%
  filter(ID == "illinois")

il_pipes <- st_intersection(pipes, IL)


```
MA
```{r}
ggplot() +
  # State outline (transparent fill)
  geom_sf(data = MA, fill = NA, color = "#2F2F2F", size = 0.6) +
  
  # Pipelines
  geom_sf(data = ma_pipes, color = "#3A6EA5", size = 0.8, alpha = 0.7) +
  
  # City point with legend
  geom_sf(
    data = boston_sf,
    aes(color = city),
    size = 3
  ) +
  
  # Color settings for the legend
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Boston" = "#E76F51"), name = "City") +
  
  # Zoom into Boston
  coord_sf(
    xlim = c(-72.0, -70.4),
    ylim = c(41.9, 42.8),
    expand = FALSE
  ) +
  
  # Remove axis text, ticks, and grid
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_blank(),
    axis.text = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks = element_blank(),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 9)
  ) +
  
  labs(title = "Natural Gas Pipelines Near Boston")

```
IL
```{r}
ggplot() +
  # State outline (transparent fill)
  geom_sf(data = IL, fill = NA, color = "#2F2F2F", size = 0.6) +
  
  # Pipelines
  geom_sf(data = il_pipes, color = "#3A6EA5", size = 0.8, alpha = 0.7) +
  
  # City point with legend
  geom_sf(
    data = chicago_sf,
    aes(color = city),
    size = 3
  ) +
  
  # Color settings for the legend
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Chicago" = "#E76F51"), name = "City") +
  
  # Zoom into Chicago
 coord_sf(
  xlim = c(-89.3, -86.3),
  ylim = c(40.6, 42.6),
  expand = FALSE
) +
  
  # Remove axis text, ticks, grid
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_blank(),
    axis.text = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks = element_blank(),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 9)
  ) +
  
  labs(title = "Natural Gas Pipelines Near Chicago")

```
```{r}


bm_il<- get_tiles(
  IL,                     # NOT ext=
  provider = "CartoDB.Positron",  # or any provider
  zoom = 10                    # increase or decrease as needed
)

bm_il_df <- as.data.frame(bm_il, xy = TRUE)

colnames(bm_il_df)[1:5] <- c("x", "y", "R", "G", "B")


ggplot() +
  
  geom_raster(
    data = bm_il_df,
    aes(x = x, y = y, fill = rgb(R, G, B, maxColorValue = 255)),
    alpha = 1
  ) +
  scale_fill_identity() +
  
  geom_sf(data = IL, fill = NA, color = "#2F2F2F", size = 0.6, alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_sf(data = il_pipes, color = "#3A6EA5", size = 0.8, alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_sf(
    data = chicago_sf,
    aes(color = city),
    size = 3
  ) +
  
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Chicago" = "#E76F51"), name = "City") +
  
  # ---- SAME ZOOM WINDOW ----
  coord_sf(
    xlim = c(-89.3, -86.3),
    ylim = c(40.6, 42.6),
    expand = FALSE
  ) +
  
  # ---- SAME THEME ----
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_blank(),
    axis.text = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks = element_blank(),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 9)
  ) +
  
  labs(title = "Natural Gas Pipelines Near Chicago")

```
Nodal Testing
```{r}

unique(sf::st_geometry_type(pipes))


pipe_net <- as_sfnetwork(pipes, directed = FALSE)

# extract only nodes
nodes <- pipe_net %>% activate(nodes)

# find which nodes lie inside the basin polygon
origin_nodes <- st_within(nodes, basin, sparse = FALSE)

# vector of node indices that lie in the Marcellus area
origin_idx <- which(origin_nodes)


pipe_components <- igraph::components(pipe_net$graph)

# which component each node belongs to
node_component <- pipe_components$membership

# which components include Marcellus-origin nodes?
origin_components <- unique(node_component[origin_idx])


connected_nodes <- which(node_component %in% origin_components)

# convert back to sf
pipes_connected <- pipe_net %>% 
  activate(edges) %>% 
  filter(.inc(connected_nodes))
```
